ast.name: confirm
ast.source:
Are you sure you want to disable script rules?

All script rules will stop working until you enable this setting again.
ast.target: 您确定要禁用脚本规则吗？\n\n所有脚本规则将停止工作，直到您再次启用此设置。

ast.name: error
ast.source: BUG: Script rule executed without security acceptance. Please report this to the plugin developers.
ast.target: 错误：脚本规则在未获得安全许可的情况下执行。请向插件开发者报告此问题。

ast.name: log
ast.source: It doesn't try to apply rules because event prevented already.
ast.target: 由于事件已被阻止，它没有尝试应用规则。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Paste transform is disabled. Skipping rule application.
ast.target: 粘贴转换已禁用。跳过规则应用。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 转换插件，剪贴板内容类型：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable automatic paste transformation by rules.
ast.target: 启用或禁用通过规则进行的自动粘贴转换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable execution of JavaScript code in script rules. This affects security.
ast.target: 启用或禁用脚本规则中JavaScript代码的执行。这会影响安全性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to see detailed logs in the developer console
ast.target: 启用以在开发者控制台中查看详细日志

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notifications when rules are triggered
ast.target: 当规则被触发时显示通知

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test your rules with sample text
ast.target: 使用示例文本测试您的规则

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Simulate selected text in the editor (used by 'Replacer with selection' and $SEL placeholder)
ast.target: 模拟编辑器中选中的文本（供“使用选中文本替换”和 $SEL 占位符使用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The result after applying rules to the sample text
ast.target: 将规则应用于示例文本后的结果

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter sample text to test your rules
ast.target: 输入示例文本以测试您的规则

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 转换后的结果将显示在此处

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Replacer to use when text is selected (optional)
ast.target: 选中文本时使用的替换器（可选）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
Notice
ast.source: ⚠️ Security error detected. Script execution blocked. Please report this bug to the plugin developers.
ast.target: ⚠️ 检测到安全错误。脚本执行已被阻止。请将此错误报告给插件开发者。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ℹ️ This is a script rule.
ast.target: ℹ️ 这是一个脚本规则。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Try to enable it to learn about security considerations. You can also delete it if not needed.
ast.target: 尝试启用它以了解安全注意事项。如果不需要，您也可以删除它。
